programmes.show_description: (2019) M. Night Shyamalan directs an all-star cast in this genre-bending superhero sequel. Three superhumans team up to escape a psychiatric ward. With Bruce Willis in a cagoule.

(1963) Classic interpretation of the Greek myth of Jason's quest to find the Golden Fleece, boasting the enduring work of special effects maestro Ray Harryhausen. Directed by Don Chaffey.
(1997) Sci-fi comedy. Tommy Lee Jones and Will Smith star as top-secret agents who monitor and hush up the presence of aliens on Earth - and discover one scary critter's deadly plot.
(2002) Tommy Lee Jones and Will Smith star in the tough action sequel to their sci-fi comedy about US government agents who secretly protect Earth from extraterrestrial criminals.
(2012) Sci-fi comedy sequel with Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones and Josh Brolin. Agent J travels to the 1960s to save his friend from being killed by a monstrous alien.
(2019) Fourth instalment of the sci-fi comedy franchise with Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson. An alien-obsessed rookie joins London's Men in Black team.
(2011) Thriller with Jason Statham and Donald Sutherland. A hitman is ordered to kill his mentor, but then takes on the dead man's son as an apprentice. Could get complicated... and deadly.
(1995) Al Pacino and Robert De Niro star in Michael Mann's crime thriller. A cop sets out to track down a career criminal and his gang of armed robbers. Violence/strong language.

(1968) Carol Reed's evergreen musical based on Charles Dickens' Oliver Twist, with Mark Lester starring as the young orphan in Victorian London. With Ron Moody and Oliver Reed.

(1972) Action adventure. Gene Hackman stars as a priest who leads a ragtag group of survivors on a life-or-death quest to escape from the capsized ocean liner Poseidon.

programmes.show_description: (1993) Comedy sequel starring Whoopi Goldberg and Lauryn Hill. Deloris - who's now made it big in Vegas - goes back undercover as a teacher to help a struggling school choir find its voice.
...Special: Rami Malek discusses playing Freddie Mercury in the rock biopic about the rise of the band Queen.
(2016) Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.
(2023) Darkly comic ursine misadventure about a disparate group of people who happen across a coked-up bear - aka Pablo Eskobear - in the American wilderness. With Keri Russell.
(2023) Gritty crime thriller with Dale Dickey. An elderly couple get fleeced for their house and savings, so granny - aka The G - goes on a vengeful rampage. Be careful who you mess with.
